<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/json-api.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-json-api-bash-1150" location="lines:1150-1153" -->
```bash
   # 2. List all users to discover the wallet admin user
   curl -s "http://localhost:2975/v2/users" \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer $USER_ADMIN_TOKEN" | jq '.users[] | select(.metadata.annotations.username == "app-user")'

```
